name: VK Full Admin
description: VK personal account and community administration with publishing, moderation, members, settings, analytics, and group dialogs

vk_user_token.description: VK user access token created through VK OAuth implicit flow; use the plugin vk_auth_user_url helper or https://oauth.vk.com/blank.html redirect with offline, wall, messages, friends, photos, groups, stats, and notifications scopes

vk_community_tokens.description: JSON object mapping community IDs without minus signs to community tokens created in VK community Manage -> Settings -> API usage -> Access tokens, for example {"123456":"token"}

tools.name: vk_auth_status
tools.description: Check VK token configuration and optionally validate the user token

tools.name: vk_auth_user_url
tools.description: Build a VK OAuth implicit-flow URL for a user token

tools.name: vk_auth_group_url
tools.description: Build a VK OAuth URL for community tokens

tools.name: vk_group_admin_check
tools.description: Validate admin rights in a VK community

tools.name: vk_user_info
tools.description: Get VK user profile information

tools.name: vk_user_messages_send
tools.description: Send a VK direct message from the user account

tools.name: vk_user_wall_post
tools.description: Publish a VK user wall post

tools.name: vk_user_friends_list
tools.description: List VK friends

tools.name: vk_group_wall_post
tools.description: Publish a post on a VK community wall

tools.name: vk_group_wall_edit
tools.description: Edit a VK community wall post

tools.name: vk_group_wall_delete
tools.description: Delete a VK community wall post

tools.name: vk_group_pin_post
tools.description: Pin or unpin a VK community wall post

tools.name: vk_group_upload_photo
tools.description: Upload a photo to a VK community

tools.name: vk_group_create_poll
tools.description: Create a VK community poll

tools.name: vk_group_comment_delete
tools.description: Delete a VK community wall comment

tools.name: vk_group_comment_hide_spam
tools.description: Report a VK community wall comment

tools.name: vk_group_ban_user
tools.description: Ban a VK user from a community

tools.name: vk_group_unban_user
tools.description: Unban a VK user from a community

tools.name: vk_group_blacklist_list
tools.description: List VK community blacklist entries

tools.name: vk_group_clean_wall
tools.description: Dry-run or delete matching VK community wall posts

tools.name: vk_group_members_list
tools.description: List VK community members

tools.name: vk_group_invite
tools.description: Invite a user to a VK community

tools.name: vk_group_remove
tools.description: Remove a user from a VK community

tools.name: vk_group_set_role
tools.description: Set a VK community manager role

tools.name: vk_group_info
tools.description: Get VK community information

tools.name: vk_group_update_settings
tools.description: Update VK community settings

tools.name: vk_group_update_cover
tools.description: Update a VK community cover image

tools.name: vk_group_update_avatar
tools.description: Update a VK community avatar

tools.name: vk_group_stats
tools.description: Get VK community statistics

tools.name: vk_group_post_reach
tools.description: Get VK community post reach

tools.name: vk_group_audience
tools.description: Get VK community audience demographics

tools.name: vk_group_msg_send
tools.description: Send a VK message from a community

tools.name: vk_group_msg_history
tools.description: Read VK community dialog history

tools.name: vk_group_msg_set_typing
tools.description: Set VK community dialog activity
